description: The hospital administration has decided that midwives should be able to register new patients directly (e.g., for newborns). Update the security permissions in the OpenMRS system (https://localhost/openmrs/admin) using the credentials 'superman' / 'Admin123'. Add the 'Add Patients' privilege to the existing 'Midwife' role and save the changes.

metadata.role_description: Midwifery staff responsible for maternity care
